caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio, as indicated by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and the clothing racks in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hand raised in one frame, suggesting he is making a point or emphasizing something. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a podcast recording environment.
